{{Expand}}

{{Infobox character
| name = Helgard Traveler
| introduced = tg-02-crimson-vault
}}

== The Crimson Vault ==
{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|A [[Helgard Traveler]] wears a thick fur-lined coat, a long beard, and a string of sharpened bones around his neck.<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c15">''The Crimson Vault'', chapter 15</ref>}}

== City of Light ==
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|[[Helgard Traveler]] is a type of traveler.<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c2">''City of Light'', chapter 2</ref>}}

== Notable quotes ==
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|"A Helgard Traveler—unmistakable with his thick fur-lined coat, his long beard, and the string of sharpened bones he wore around his neck—placed one gloved hand on Alin's shoulder."<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c15" />}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:The Crimson Vault]]
[[Category:City of Light]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate characters]]
